data.body: PASS 1 (G6 approach soundness): No findings. The doc-reference approach is sound and well-grounded — referenced symbols (sign_manifest, run_workflow, validate_structured, register_contract, resolve_prompt) all verified to exist at the cited modules. The automated introspection-based drift-check (test_reuse_surface_doc.py) is the correct anti-staleness mechanism for an API reference. Positive rationale is stated in the Why section. No clearly-superior alternative missed.
